Biology.Flavor Profile: 90% dark chocolate mixed with espresso and a hint of savory umami (mushroom)

Industrial & Culinary Utility.Ration-Bricks: pressed into dense, non-perishable bricks for military rations
Industrial & Culinary Utility.Luxury Confectionery: refined with sugar and milk, becomes the most expensive dessert in the world ('Black-Gold Mousse')

Harvest & Danger.Harvest Method: monkeys must climb down into the dark underside of the canopy to dig them out of the bark
Harvest & Danger.The Risk: domain of spiders and bats, harvesters often fight for their haul
